query_normalized: multi-lcb: extending livecodebench to multiple programming languages computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on a specific model architecture (JaCoText) for Java code generation, which is a distinct methodological contribution rather than a study of the LiveCodeBench benchmark, its extension to multiple languages, or the empirical evaluation of multi-language capabilities. It does not measure the same mechanism, establish a baseline for the specific benchmark extension, or serve as a foundational reference for the "Multi-LCB" concept, failing to meet any of the inclusion criteria (a-f
